docos_git_source_path_unique.name: docos_git_source_path_unique
docos_git_source_path_unique.where: "docos"."git_source_id" IS NOT NULL AND "docos"."path_in_source" IS NOT NULL

public.latest_versions.definition:
SELECT
      d.id AS doco_id,
      v.id AS version_id,
      v.version_number,
      v.kind,
      v.type,
      v.title,
      v.description,
      v.applies_to,
      v.status,
      v.language,
      v.difficulty,
      v.aliases,
      v.body_text,
      v.body_format,
      v.up_votes_cache,
      v.down_votes_cache,
      v.embedding,
      v.published_at
    FROM docos d
    INNER JOIN versions v ON v.id = d.latest_published_version_id
public.latest_versions.name: latest_versions
